title: Willard Xpress George: Your trusted local battery specialist
description: BUSINESS NEWS - Since opening our doors in...
bodyText:
Sponsored Content

BUSINESS NEWS - Since opening our doors in May 2022, Willard Xpress George has been dedicated to providing exceptional battery solutions to the George community and surrounding areas.


> Located at 23 York Street, Dormehls Drift, our store offers a wide range of automotive batteries and related services to meet the diverse needs of our customers.


Our product rangeAt Willard Xpress George, we pride ourselves on offering premium battery brands, including the trusted Willard brand, known for its quality and reliability. Our extensive product range includes:

- Automotive batteries: Suitable for a variety of vehicles, ensuring optimal performance and longevity.
- Motorcycle batteries: Designed to withstand the unique demands of motorcycles.
- Leisure batteries: Ideal for caravans, boats and other recreational vehicles.
- Commercial batteries: Engineered to meet the high demands of commercial vehicles.
- Industrial batteries: Reliable power solutions for industrial applications.
- Agricultural batteries: Durable batteries tailored for agricultural machinery.

Exceptional customer serviceOur commitment to excellent customer service sets us apart. Our knowledgeable and friendly staff are always ready to assist you in finding the right battery for your needs. We offer expert advice, battery testing, and installation services to ensure your complete satisfaction.

Photo Gallery - Your trusted local battery specialist

Convenient servicesUnderstanding the importance of convenience, we provide:

- Battery testing: Assessing the health of your current battery to determine if a replacement is necessary.
- Battery installation: Professional installation services to get you back on the road quickly.
- Battery recycling: Environmentally responsible disposal of old batteries.
- Battery on call: A mobile fitment service that delivers and installs your battery at your location – quick, easy, and hassle-free. Call us on 044 873 0488 or inquire online at willardbatteryxpress.co.za/deliver-fit-my-battery.

Visit us todayWhether you're in need of a new battery or require expert advice, Willard Xpress George is here to help. Visit us at 23 York Street, Dormehls Drift, George, or contact us on 044 873 0488 for more information.

For a comprehensive look at our products and services, please visit our website: https://willardbatteryxpress.co.za/

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
